title: CHAN modpack
description: Optimization mods for BETTER performance and Iris for shaders. Mods for building blocks and decorations, and more.
body:
**Pack de Mods CHAN | Pack of CHAN Mods**

- Optimization mods for better performance.
- Iris for shaders.
- Mods for building blocks and decorations.
- Quality-of-life feature mods for a smoother gameplay experience.
- And more.

This modpack focuses on maintaining a vanilla experience while introducing more blocks and variety for building. It includes **1250+ furniture items**, thanks to four freshly made mods for Minecraft version **1.21.4**.


More mods will be added as they become available for this version of the modpack.
